scripts.build: npm run build:parse && npm run build:midi && npm run build:cstree && npm run build:editor && npm run build:native && npm run build:lsp && npm run build:cli && npm run build:vscode && npm run build:preview && npm run build:kak
scripts.build:production: npm run build:parse && npm run build:midi && npm run build:cstree && npm run build:editor && npm run build:native && npm run build:lsp && npm run build:cli && npm run build:vscode-production && npm run build:preview
scripts.test: npm run test -w parse && npm run test -w abcls-midi  && npm run test -w cstree && npm run test -w editor && npm run test -w abcls-server && npm run test -w abcls-kak
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w parse && npm run lint -w cstree && npm run lint -w editor && npm run lint -w abcls-midi && npm run lint -w abcls-server && npm run lint -w abcls-cli && npm run lint -w vscode-extension && npm run lint -w abcls-preview-server && npm run lint -w abcls-kak
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w parse && npm run lint:fix -w cstree && npm run lint:fix -w editor && npm run lint:fix -w abcls-midi && npm run lint:fix -w abcls-server && npm run lint:fix -w abcls-cli && npm run lint:fix -w vscode-extension && npm run lint:fix -w abcls-preview-server && npm run lint:fix -w abcls-kak
